TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lai He == Piharatengan to kapatay ni Lai He i 1/31 Ira ko cecay romi'ad, ira ko cecay fafahiyan no yincumin nai Poli, halafinay ko adada a caay ka nga'ay, awaay ko sapaising a payso, na pakatengil ira ko kalasini'adaay ising itira i Canghua ci Lai He saan, saka naitira i Poli rakat saan a tayra i Canghua mikilim ci LaiHe isingan. Oya ngataay no paisingan a tamdamdaw miliyok minengneng toya "Huana" a tamdaw, kaketeren ni LaiHe milaplap. Sasongila' han to ni Lai He misapinang ko adada noya fafahiyan a yincumin, tafo han ko sapaiyo pafeli i cingraan, caay piala to payso to pipaisingan, pafelien ho to 50 limood koya yincumin, sakalic to paso a minokay, akaa rakat saan minokay han ko paro'ot. Hakowaay ko 50 payso? Dotocen ko ni akong ako to kalasingsi a lifon to cecay folad 30 k payso, pakasadak ho ci Lai He to rafasay foladan no kalasingsi pafeli toya marorayay a yincumin. I 1894 miheca masofoc ci Lai He i Canghua. Masawad ci Lai He nai Gabanazu ika daigaku Taywan (aniniay Taywan daykako ikayin). Ira ci Du Congming, Weng Junming ko cefang ningra mitilid itiya, o safa ho to liyad ningra ci Jiang Weishui. O kalasini'adaay to tamdaw a mitiliday ising cingra itiya. 'Aloman ko caayay ka pakasadak to sapaising to payso a adadaay tamdaw, patahtah sa papitadah cangraan, I'ayaw sato no pafilongan pafeli han aca, maraod sato ko romi'ad caayay patiko to nitadahan payso haemin han to ningra mitodoh. Ira ko makalahay mitakop patiko i, wangawang sa to kamay ci Lai He, awaayto matodoh to ako han ningra koya nitadahan a kami, caen to patiko han ningra. Masamatira ko demak ni Lai He, naikoran ningra awaay ko materekay nisidayan a maamaan a dafongan, ikor masiday ko tadah 'ofadan payso to nicaliwan. Ira ko cecay, oya masafena'ay ko toros a wawa, hinokop sa ci Lai He to tireng o ngoyos ko sapiceloh to fena', ta loalo' sato ngoyos misiwtok. Oni sa a wawa nai kaemangan tangasa kato'asan, to mihecahecaan tayra i pitademan mita'ong ci Lai Hean. Sacisowal sa: "Paroot ko mama ako itiya takowan, o tadasini'adaay ita ci "He asien" tamdaw, da'oc no 'orip aka tawalen" saan. Caay ka dengan pipa'orip ni Lai He, halo mipa'oripay to kitakit. mikihatiya to sakerid ni Lin Xiantang aci Jiang Weishui to Taywan ponka yofayof, Taywan laocan patireng to pingitangitan a onto, mikehar cingra to maomaahay, matayalay onto. O kailoan no micalapay mikowan a Dipong, kinatosa marepet a rofoen, nai "demak no imeng" a masadak i, hamhamen no finawlan ko pinokay ningra. Ira ko pitoay rowis a 'olc "pinokay marofo", ini ko nitilidan ni Lai He: Marofirof ko nga'ay to tatiihay, o sapiliyang to saki'orip to da'oc. Cima ko mafana'ay to kacacefis no tao a minengneng, matiya o katapi' i kaaloodan ko nokay. Mikihatiya patireng ci Lai He to "finawlan sinpon no Taywan", malacitodongay to sakiponkaan to tilid. Mafenekay to to'asan a 'olic, palowad to fa'elohay tilidan. Kadofah ko ni'olican, tilidan ningra, saka masowal o "mama no fa'elohay tilidan no Taywan" han ko pangangan. O nitilidan ningra saheto o pikihar to marorayay finawlan, wata ko piliyang to micalapay mikowan a Dipong. Ira ko pasowalay tamdaw o "Lu Xun no Taywan" sa ko patinako cingraan. O satadamaanay nitilidan ningra "o cecay satingting", "caay ko nga'ayay a pafilong", "nga'ayay pikokso tamdaw a kimad", "liwadiway demak", fa'elohay 'olic ira "kalaliyas a 'olic", "katapi'elalan a kinalefoh: paini to cefang i Elinay a kacidemak", "kararoman 'olic no Nanko", "maoahay tamdaw", "kasiniadaan pakoyocay fafahiyan", "radiw no maomahay", "laling no maomahay", "kasi'enawan fa'eloh ko nilitodan". Ira ko "'olic no timolay kitakit" o piliyang to lalood i Wushe a tilid; patinako to nisamsaman no Dipong a "o cecay a satingting" nao pikowan to'ek ho ni Lee Tenghui mapateli i hong no kocong itiya. I 1932 miheca, lekapoten ningra ci Ye Rongzhong aci Guo Qiusheng patireng midemak to "Nanyin" casi, palowad to cifaloco'ay to sakitilid no Taywan a mitiliday tamdaw no Taywan. Caay kahalafin ko nikasadak to saka tosa ningra nai pirofoan, masamo' to ko tireng ni Lai He, i 1943 miheca 1 folad 31 romi'ad, ciadada to faloco' a mapatay. Nao sowal ni Lai He: "O macodahay tamdaw kao mo'ecelay ko sapilood". Ano caayay ko marataray mapatay a macodahay tamdaw kao mo'ecelay ko milooday, matiniay a mafenekay tamdaw, latek ikoran no lalood caay pakaliyas to 228 demak ato katalawan a sakapatay latek. Mitiliday ci Li Xiaofeng Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == 删ai 魔蓹 == pi魔arat蓹艐an to~u kapataj ni 删ai 魔蓹 i */** ira ko~u 师蓹师aj ro~umi省a涩~僧, ira ko~u 师蓹师aj fafa魔ijan no~u jin师o~u~umin nai po~u删i, 魔a删afinaj ko~u a涩~僧a涩~僧a a 师aaj ka 艐a省aj, awaaj ko~u sapaisi艐 a pajso~u, na pakat蓹艐i删 ira ko~u ka删asini省a涩~僧aaj isi艐 itira i 师a艐魔o~u~ua 师i 删ai 魔蓹 saan, saka naitira i po~u删i rakat saan a tajra i 师a艐魔o~u~ua miki删im 师i 删ai魔蓹 isi艐an. o~uja 艐ataaj no~u paisi艐an a tam涩~僧am涩~僧aw mi删ijo~uk min蓹艐n蓹艐 to~uja "魔o~u~uana" a tam涩~僧aw, kak蓹t蓹r蓹n ni 删ai魔蓹 mi删ap删ap. saso~u艐i删a省 魔an to~u ni 删ai 魔蓹 misapina艐 ko~u a涩~僧a涩~僧a no~uja fafa魔ijan a jin师o~u~umin, tafo~u 魔an ko~u sapaijo~u paf蓹删i i 师i艐raan, 师aaj pia删a to~u pajso~u to~u pipaisi艐an, paf蓹删i蓹n 魔o~u to~u ** 删imo~uo~u涩~僧 ko~uja jin师o~u~umin, saka删i师 to~u paso~u a mino~ukaj, akaa rakat saan mino~ukaj 魔an ko~u paro~u省o~ut. 魔ako~uwaaj ko~u ** pajso~u? 涩~僧o~uto~u师蓹n ko~u ni ako~u艐 ako~u to~u ka删asi艐si a 删ifo~un to~u 师蓹师aj fo~u删a涩~僧 ** k pajso~u, pakasa涩~僧ak 魔o~u 师i 删ai 魔蓹 to~u rafasaj fo~u删a涩~僧an no~u ka删asi艐si paf蓹删i to~uja maro~urajaj a jin师o~u~umin. i **** mi魔蓹师a maso~ufo~u师 师i 删ai 魔蓹 i 师a艐魔o~u~ua. masawa涩~僧 师i 删ai 魔蓹 nai *ab~b~vana*o~u~u ika 涩~僧ai*ako~u~u tajwan (aniniaj tajwan 涩~僧ajkako~u ikajin). ira 师i 涩~僧o~u~u 师o~u艐mi艐, w蓹艐 *o~u~unmi艐 ko~u 师蓹fa艐 ni艐ra miti删i涩~僧 itija, o~u safa 魔o~u to~u 删ija涩~僧 ni艐ra 师i *ia艐 w蓹is魔o~u~ui. o~u ka删asini省a涩~僧aaj to~u tam涩~僧aw a miti删i涩~僧aj isi艐 师i艐ra itija. 省a删o~uman ko~u 师aajaj ka pakasa涩~僧ak to~u sapaisi艐 to~u pajso~u a a涩~僧a涩~僧aaj tam涩~僧aw, pata魔ta魔 sa papita涩~僧a魔 师a艐raan, i省ajaw sato~u no~u pafi删o~u艐an paf蓹删i 魔an a师a, marao~u涩~僧 sato~u ko~u ro~umi省a涩~僧 师aajaj patiko~u to~u nita涩~僧a魔an pajso~u 魔a蓹min 魔an to~u ni艐ra mito~u涩~僧o~u魔. ira ko~u maka删a魔aj mitako~up patiko~u i, wa艐awa艐 sa to~u kamaj 师i 删ai 魔蓹, awaajto~u mato~u涩~僧o~u魔 to~u ako~u 魔an ni艐ra ko~uja nita涩~僧a魔an a kami, 师a蓹n to~u patiko~u 魔an ni艐ra. masamatira ko~u 涩~僧蓹mak ni 删ai 魔蓹, naiko~uran ni艐ra awaaj ko~u mat蓹r蓹kaj nisi涩~僧ajan a maamaan a 涩~僧afo~u艐an, iko~ur masi涩~僧aj ko~u ta涩~僧a魔 省o~ufa涩~僧an pajso~u to~u ni师a删iwan. ira ko~u 师蓹师aj, o~uja masaf蓹na省aj ko~u to~uro~us a wawa, 魔ino~uko~up sa 师i 删ai 魔蓹 to~u tir蓹艐 o~u 艐o~ujo~us ko~u sapi师蓹删o~u魔 to~u f蓹na省, ta 删o~ua删o~u省 sato~u 艐o~ujo~us misiwto~uk. o~uni sa a wawa nai ka蓹ma艐an ta艐asa kato~u省asan, to~u mi魔蓹师a魔蓹师aan tajra i pita涩~僧蓹man mita省o~u艐 师i 删ai 魔蓹an. sa师iso~uwa删 sa: "paro~uo~ut ko~u mama ako~u itija tako~uwan, o~u ta涩~僧asini省a涩~僧aaj ita 师i "魔蓹 asi蓹n" tam涩~僧aw, 涩~僧a省o~u师 no~u 省o~urip aka tawa删蓹n" saan. 师aaj ka 涩~僧蓹艐an pipa省o~urip ni 删ai 魔蓹, 魔a删o~u mipa省o~uripaj to~u kitakit. miki魔atija to~u sak蓹ri涩~僧 ni 删in xianta艐 a师i *ia艐 w蓹is魔o~u~ui to~u tajwan po~unka jo~ufajo~uf, tajwan 删ao~u师an patir蓹艐 to~u pi艐ita艐itan a o~unto~u, mik蓹魔ar 师i艐ra to~u mao~umaa魔aj, mataja删aj o~unto~u. o~u kai删o~uan no~u mi师a删apaj miko~uwan a 涩~僧ipo~u艐, kinato~usa mar蓹p蓹t a ro~ufo~u蓹n, nai "涩~僧蓹mak no~u im蓹艐" a masa涩~僧ak i, 魔am魔am蓹n no~u finaw删an ko~u pino~ukaj ni艐ra. ira ko~u pito~uaj ro~uwis a 省o~u删师 "pino~ukaj maro~ufo~u", ini ko~u niti删i涩~僧an ni 删ai 魔蓹: maro~ufiro~uf ko~u 艐a省aj to~u tatii魔aj, o~u sapi删ija艐 to~u saki省o~urip to~u 涩~僧a省o~u师. 师ima ko~u mafana省aj to~u ka师a师蓹fis no~u tao~u a min蓹艐n蓹艐, matija o~u katapi省 i kaa删o~uo~u涩~僧an ko~u no~ukaj. miki魔atija patir蓹艐 师i 删ai 魔蓹 to~u "finaw删an sinpo~un no~u tajwan", ma删a师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj to~u sakipo~unkaan to~u ti删i涩~僧. maf蓹n蓹kaj to~u to~u省asan a 省o~u删i师, pa删o~uwa涩~僧 to~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj ti删i涩~僧an. ka涩~僧o~ufa魔 ko~u ni省o~u删i师an, ti删i涩~僧an ni艐ra, saka maso~uwa删 o~u "mama no~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj ti删i涩~僧an no~u tajwan" 魔an ko~u pa艐a艐an. o~u niti删i涩~僧an ni艐ra sa魔蓹to~u o~u piki魔ar to~u maro~urajaj finaw删an, wata ko~u pi删ija艐 to~u mi师a删apaj miko~uwan a 涩~僧ipo~u艐. ira ko~u paso~uwa删aj tam涩~僧aw o~u "删o~u~u xo~u~un no~u tajwan" sa ko~u patinako~u 师i艐raan. o~u sata涩~僧amaanaj niti删i涩~僧an ni艐ra "o~u 师蓹师aj sati艐ti艐", "师aaj ko~u 艐a省ajaj a pafi删o~u艐", "艐a省ajaj piko~ukso~u tam涩~僧aw a kima涩~僧", "删iwa涩~僧iwaj 涩~僧蓹mak", fa省蓹删o~u魔aj 省o~u删i师 ira "ka删a删ijas a 省o~u删i师", "katapi省蓹删a删an a kina删蓹fo~u魔: paini to~u 师蓹fa艐 i 蓹删inaj a ka师i涩~僧蓹mak", "kararo~uman 省o~u删i师 no~u nanko~u", "mao~ua魔aj tam涩~僧aw", "kasinia涩~僧aan pako~ujo~u师aj fafa魔ijan", "ra涩~僧iw no~u mao~uma魔aj", "删a删i艐 no~u mao~uma魔aj", "kasi省蓹nawan fa省蓹删o~u魔 ko~u ni删ito~u涩~僧an". ira ko~u "省o~u删i师 no~u timo~u删aj kitakit" o~u pi删ija艐 to~u 删a删o~uo~u涩~僧 i wo~u~us魔蓹 a ti删i涩~僧; patinako~u to~u nisamsaman no~u 涩~僧ipo~u艐 a "o~u 师蓹师aj a sati艐ti艐" nao~u piko~uwan to~u省蓹k 魔o~u ni 删蓹蓹 t蓹艐魔o~u~ui mapat蓹删i i 魔o~u艐 no~u ko~u师o~u艐 itija. i **** mi魔蓹师a, 删蓹kapo~ut蓹n ni艐ra 师i j蓹 ro~u艐*魔o~u艐 a师i *o~u~uo~u *io~u~us魔蓹艐 patir蓹艐 mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u "nanjin" 师asi, pa删o~uwa涩~僧 to~u 师ifa删o~u师o~u省aj to~u sakiti删i涩~僧 no~u tajwan a miti删i涩~僧aj tam涩~僧aw no~u tajwan. 师aaj ka魔a删afin ko~u nikasa涩~僧ak to~u saka to~usa ni艐ra nai piro~ufo~uan, masamo~u省 to~u ko~u tir蓹艐 ni 删ai 魔蓹, i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, 师ia涩~僧a涩~僧a to~u fa删o~u师o~u省 a mapataj. nao~u so~uwa删 ni 删ai 魔蓹: "o~u ma师o~u涩~僧a魔aj tam涩~僧aw kao~u mo~u省蓹师蓹删aj ko~u sapi删o~uo~u涩~僧". ano~u 师aajaj ko~u marataraj mapataj a ma师o~u涩~僧a魔aj tam涩~僧aw kao~u mo~u省蓹师蓹删aj ko~u mi删o~uo~u涩~僧aj, matiniaj a maf蓹n蓹kaj tam涩~僧aw, 删at蓹k iko~uran no~u 删a删o~uo~u涩~僧 师aaj paka删ijas to~u *** 涩~僧蓹mak ato~u kata删awan a sakapataj 删at蓹k. miti删i涩~僧aj 师i 删i xiao~uf蓹艐 mifa删i师aj 师i masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == Lai He == Piharatengan to kapatay ni Lai He i 1/31 Ira ko cecay romi'ad, ira ko cecay fafahiyan no yincumin nai Poli, halafinay ko adada a caay ka nga'ay, awaay ko sapaising a payso, na pakatengil ira ko kalasini'adaay ising itira i Canghua ci Lai He saan, saka naitira i Poli rakat saan a tayra i Canghua mikilim ci LaiHe isingan. Oya ngataay no paisingan a tamdamdaw miliyok minengneng toya "Huana" a tamdaw, kaketeren ni LaiHe milaplap. Sasongila' han to ni Lai He misapinang ko adada noya fafahiyan a yincumin, tafo han ko sapaiyo pafeli i cingraan, caay piala to payso to pipaisingan, pafelien ho to 50 limood koya yincumin, sakalic to paso a minokay, akaa rakat saan minokay han ko paro'ot. Hakowaay ko 50 payso? Dotocen ko ni akong ako to kalasingsi a lifon to cecay folad 30 k payso, pakasadak ho ci Lai He to rafasay foladan no kalasingsi pafeli toya marorayay a yincumin. I 1894 miheca masofoc ci Lai He i Canghua. Masawad ci Lai He nai Gabanazu ika daigaku Taywan (aniniay Taywan daykako ikayin). Ira ci Du Congming, Weng Junming ko cefang ningra mitilid itiya, o safa ho to liyad ningra ci Jiang Weishui. O kalasini'adaay to tamdaw a mitiliday ising cingra itiya. 'Aloman ko caayay ka pakasadak to sapaising to payso a adadaay tamdaw, patahtah sa papitadah cangraan, I'ayaw sato no pafilongan pafeli han aca, maraod sato ko romi'ad caayay patiko to nitadahan payso haemin han to ningra mitodoh. Ira ko makalahay mitakop patiko i, wangawang sa to kamay ci Lai He, awaayto matodoh to ako han ningra koya nitadahan a kami, caen to patiko han ningra. Masamatira ko demak ni Lai He, naikoran ningra awaay ko materekay nisidayan a maamaan a dafongan, ikor masiday ko tadah 'ofadan payso to nicaliwan. Ira ko cecay, oya masafena'ay ko toros a wawa, hinokop sa ci Lai He to tireng o ngoyos ko sapiceloh to fena', ta loalo' sato ngoyos misiwtok. Oni sa a wawa nai kaemangan tangasa kato'asan, to mihecahecaan tayra i pitademan mita'ong ci Lai Hean. Sacisowal sa: "Paroot ko mama ako itiya takowan, o tadasini'adaay ita ci "He asien" tamdaw, da'oc no 'orip aka tawalen" saan. Caay ka dengan pipa'orip ni Lai He, halo mipa'oripay to kitakit. mikihatiya to sakerid ni Lin Xiantang aci Jiang Weishui to Taywan ponka yofayof, Taywan laocan patireng to pingitangitan a onto, mikehar cingra to maomaahay, matayalay onto. O kailoan no micalapay mikowan a Dipong, kinatosa marepet a rofoen, nai "demak no imeng" a masadak i, hamhamen no finawlan ko pinokay ningra. Ira ko pitoay rowis a 'olc "pinokay marofo", ini ko nitilidan ni Lai He: Marofirof ko nga'ay to tatiihay, o sapiliyang to saki'orip to da'oc. Cima ko mafana'ay to kacacefis no tao a minengneng, matiya o katapi' i kaaloodan ko nokay. Mikihatiya patireng ci Lai He to "finawlan sinpon no Taywan", malacitodongay to sakiponkaan to tilid. Mafenekay to to'asan a 'olic, palowad to fa'elohay tilidan. Kadofah ko ni'olican, tilidan ningra, saka masowal o "mama no fa'elohay tilidan no Taywan" han ko pangangan. O nitilidan ningra saheto o pikihar to marorayay finawlan, wata ko piliyang to micalapay mikowan a Dipong. Ira ko pasowalay tamdaw o "Lu Xun no Taywan" sa ko patinako cingraan. O satadamaanay nitilidan ningra "o cecay satingting", "caay ko nga'ayay a pafilong", "nga'ayay pikokso tamdaw a kimad", "liwadiway demak", fa'elohay 'olic ira "kalaliyas a 'olic", "katapi'elalan a kinalefoh: paini to cefang i Elinay a kacidemak", "kararoman 'olic no Nanko", "maoahay tamdaw", "kasiniadaan pakoyocay fafahiyan", "radiw no maomahay", "laling no maomahay", "kasi'enawan fa'eloh ko nilitodan". Ira ko "'olic no timolay kitakit" o piliyang to lalood i Wushe a tilid; patinako to nisamsaman no Dipong a "o cecay a satingting" nao pikowan to'ek ho ni Lee Tenghui mapateli i hong no kocong itiya. I 1932 miheca, lekapoten ningra ci Ye Rongzhong aci Guo Qiusheng patireng midemak to "Nanyin" casi, palowad to cifaloco'ay to sakitilid no Taywan a mitiliday tamdaw no Taywan. Caay kahalafin ko nikasadak to saka tosa ningra nai pirofoan, masamo' to ko tireng ni Lai He, i 1943 miheca 1 folad 31 romi'ad, ciadada to faloco' a mapatay. Nao sowal ni Lai He: "O macodahay tamdaw kao mo'ecelay ko sapilood". Ano caayay ko marataray mapatay a macodahay tamdaw kao mo'ecelay ko milooday, matiniay a mafenekay tamdaw, latek ikoran no lalood caay pakaliyas to 228 demak ato katalawan a sakapatay latek. Mitiliday ci Li Xiaofeng Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == 删ai 魔蓹 == pi魔arat蓹艐an to~u kapataj ni 删ai 魔蓹 i */** ira ko~u 师蓹师aj ro~umi省a涩~僧, ira ko~u 师蓹师aj fafa魔ijan no~u jin师o~u~umin nai po~u删i, 魔a删afinaj ko~u a涩~僧a涩~僧a a 师aaj ka 艐a省aj, awaaj ko~u sapaisi艐 a pajso~u, na pakat蓹艐i删 ira ko~u ka删asini省a涩~僧aaj isi艐 itira i 师a艐魔o~u~ua 师i 删ai 魔蓹 saan, saka naitira i po~u删i rakat saan a tajra i 师a艐魔o~u~ua miki删im 师i 删ai魔蓹 isi艐an. o~uja 艐ataaj no~u paisi艐an a tam涩~僧am涩~僧aw mi删ijo~uk min蓹艐n蓹艐 to~uja "魔o~u~uana" a tam涩~僧aw, kak蓹t蓹r蓹n ni 删ai魔蓹 mi删ap删ap. saso~u艐i删a省 魔an to~u ni 删ai 魔蓹 misapina艐 ko~u a涩~僧a涩~僧a no~uja fafa魔ijan a jin师o~u~umin, tafo~u 魔an ko~u sapaijo~u paf蓹删i i 师i艐raan, 师aaj pia删a to~u pajso~u to~u pipaisi艐an, paf蓹删i蓹n 魔o~u to~u ** 删imo~uo~u涩~僧 ko~uja jin师o~u~umin, saka删i师 to~u paso~u a mino~ukaj, akaa rakat saan mino~ukaj 魔an ko~u paro~u省o~ut. 魔ako~uwaaj ko~u ** pajso~u? 涩~僧o~uto~u师蓹n ko~u ni ako~u艐 ako~u to~u ka删asi艐si a 删ifo~un to~u 师蓹师aj fo~u删a涩~僧 ** k pajso~u, pakasa涩~僧ak 魔o~u 师i 删ai 魔蓹 to~u rafasaj fo~u删a涩~僧an no~u ka删asi艐si paf蓹删i to~uja maro~urajaj a jin师o~u~umin. i **** mi魔蓹师a maso~ufo~u师 师i 删ai 魔蓹 i 师a艐魔o~u~ua. masawa涩~僧 师i 删ai 魔蓹 nai *ab~b~vana*o~u~u ika 涩~僧ai*ako~u~u tajwan (aniniaj tajwan 涩~僧ajkako~u ikajin). ira 师i 涩~僧o~u~u 师o~u艐mi艐, w蓹艐 *o~u~unmi艐 ko~u 师蓹fa艐 ni艐ra miti删i涩~僧 itija, o~u safa 魔o~u to~u 删ija涩~僧 ni艐ra 师i *ia艐 w蓹is魔o~u~ui. o~u ka删asini省a涩~僧aaj to~u tam涩~僧aw a miti删i涩~僧aj isi艐 师i艐ra itija. 省a删o~uman ko~u 师aajaj ka pakasa涩~僧ak to~u sapaisi艐 to~u pajso~u a a涩~僧a涩~僧aaj tam涩~僧aw, pata魔ta魔 sa papita涩~僧a魔 师a艐raan, i省ajaw sato~u no~u pafi删o~u艐an paf蓹删i 魔an a师a, marao~u涩~僧 sato~u ko~u ro~umi省a涩~僧 师aajaj patiko~u to~u nita涩~僧a魔an pajso~u 魔a蓹min 魔an to~u ni艐ra mito~u涩~僧o~u魔. ira ko~u maka删a魔aj mitako~up patiko~u i, wa艐awa艐 sa to~u kamaj 师i 删ai 魔蓹, awaajto~u mato~u涩~僧o~u魔 to~u ako~u 魔an ni艐ra ko~uja nita涩~僧a魔an a kami, 师a蓹n to~u patiko~u 魔an ni艐ra. masamatira ko~u 涩~僧蓹mak ni 删ai 魔蓹, naiko~uran ni艐ra awaaj ko~u mat蓹r蓹kaj nisi涩~僧ajan a maamaan a 涩~僧afo~u艐an, iko~ur masi涩~僧aj ko~u ta涩~僧a魔 省o~ufa涩~僧an pajso~u to~u ni师a删iwan. ira ko~u 师蓹师aj, o~uja masaf蓹na省aj ko~u to~uro~us a wawa, 魔ino~uko~up sa 师i 删ai 魔蓹 to~u tir蓹艐 o~u 艐o~ujo~us ko~u sapi师蓹删o~u魔 to~u f蓹na省, ta 删o~ua删o~u省 sato~u 艐o~ujo~us misiwto~uk. o~uni sa a wawa nai ka蓹ma艐an ta艐asa kato~u省asan, to~u mi魔蓹师a魔蓹师aan tajra i pita涩~僧蓹man mita省o~u艐 师i 删ai 魔蓹an. sa师iso~uwa删 sa: "paro~uo~ut ko~u mama ako~u itija tako~uwan, o~u ta涩~僧asini省a涩~僧aaj ita 师i "魔蓹 asi蓹n" tam涩~僧aw, 涩~僧a省o~u师 no~u 省o~urip aka tawa删蓹n" saan. 师aaj ka 涩~僧蓹艐an pipa省o~urip ni 删ai 魔蓹, 魔a删o~u mipa省o~uripaj to~u kitakit. miki魔atija to~u sak蓹ri涩~僧 ni 删in xianta艐 a师i *ia艐 w蓹is魔o~u~ui to~u tajwan po~unka jo~ufajo~uf, tajwan 删ao~u师an patir蓹艐 to~u pi艐ita艐itan a o~unto~u, mik蓹魔ar 师i艐ra to~u mao~umaa魔aj, mataja删aj o~unto~u. o~u kai删o~uan no~u mi师a删apaj miko~uwan a 涩~僧ipo~u艐, kinato~usa mar蓹p蓹t a ro~ufo~u蓹n, nai "涩~僧蓹mak no~u im蓹艐" a masa涩~僧ak i, 魔am魔am蓹n no~u finaw删an ko~u pino~ukaj ni艐ra. ira ko~u pito~uaj ro~uwis a 省o~u删师 "pino~ukaj maro~ufo~u", ini ko~u niti删i涩~僧an ni 删ai 魔蓹: maro~ufiro~uf ko~u 艐a省aj to~u tatii魔aj, o~u sapi删ija艐 to~u saki省o~urip to~u 涩~僧a省o~u师. 师ima ko~u mafana省aj to~u ka师a师蓹fis no~u tao~u a min蓹艐n蓹艐, matija o~u katapi省 i kaa删o~uo~u涩~僧an ko~u no~ukaj. miki魔atija patir蓹艐 师i 删ai 魔蓹 to~u "finaw删an sinpo~un no~u tajwan", ma删a师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj to~u sakipo~unkaan to~u ti删i涩~僧. maf蓹n蓹kaj to~u to~u省asan a 省o~u删i师, pa删o~uwa涩~僧 to~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj ti删i涩~僧an. ka涩~僧o~ufa魔 ko~u ni省o~u删i师an, ti删i涩~僧an ni艐ra, saka maso~uwa删 o~u "mama no~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj ti删i涩~僧an no~u tajwan" 魔an ko~u pa艐a艐an. o~u niti删i涩~僧an ni艐ra sa魔蓹to~u o~u piki魔ar to~u maro~urajaj finaw删an, wata ko~u pi删ija艐 to~u mi师a删apaj miko~uwan a 涩~僧ipo~u艐. ira ko~u paso~uwa删aj tam涩~僧aw o~u "删o~u~u xo~u~un no~u tajwan" sa ko~u patinako~u 师i艐raan. o~u sata涩~僧amaanaj niti删i涩~僧an ni艐ra "o~u 师蓹师aj sati艐ti艐", "师aaj ko~u 艐a省ajaj a pafi删o~u艐", "艐a省ajaj piko~ukso~u tam涩~僧aw a kima涩~僧", "删iwa涩~僧iwaj 涩~僧蓹mak", fa省蓹删o~u魔aj 省o~u删i师 ira "ka删a删ijas a 省o~u删i师", "katapi省蓹删a删an a kina删蓹fo~u魔: paini to~u 师蓹fa艐 i 蓹删inaj a ka师i涩~僧蓹mak", "kararo~uman 省o~u删i师 no~u nanko~u", "mao~ua魔aj tam涩~僧aw", "kasinia涩~僧aan pako~ujo~u师aj fafa魔ijan", "ra涩~僧iw no~u mao~uma魔aj", "删a删i艐 no~u mao~uma魔aj", "kasi省蓹nawan fa省蓹删o~u魔 ko~u ni删ito~u涩~僧an". ira ko~u "省o~u删i师 no~u timo~u删aj kitakit" o~u pi删ija艐 to~u 删a删o~uo~u涩~僧 i wo~u~us魔蓹 a ti删i涩~僧; patinako~u to~u nisamsaman no~u 涩~僧ipo~u艐 a "o~u 师蓹师aj a sati艐ti艐" nao~u piko~uwan to~u省蓹k 魔o~u ni 删蓹蓹 t蓹艐魔o~u~ui mapat蓹删i i 魔o~u艐 no~u ko~u师o~u艐 itija. i **** mi魔蓹师a, 删蓹kapo~ut蓹n ni艐ra 师i j蓹 ro~u艐*魔o~u艐 a师i *o~u~uo~u *io~u~us魔蓹艐 patir蓹艐 mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u "nanjin" 师asi, pa删o~uwa涩~僧 to~u 师ifa删o~u师o~u省aj to~u sakiti删i涩~僧 no~u tajwan a miti删i涩~僧aj tam涩~僧aw no~u tajwan. 师aaj ka魔a删afin ko~u nikasa涩~僧ak to~u saka to~usa ni艐ra nai piro~ufo~uan, masamo~u省 to~u ko~u tir蓹艐 ni 删ai 魔蓹, i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, 师ia涩~僧a涩~僧a to~u fa删o~u师o~u省 a mapataj. nao~u so~uwa删 ni 删ai 魔蓹: "o~u ma师o~u涩~僧a魔aj tam涩~僧aw kao~u mo~u省蓹师蓹删aj ko~u sapi删o~uo~u涩~僧". ano~u 师aajaj ko~u marataraj mapataj a ma师o~u涩~僧a魔aj tam涩~僧aw kao~u mo~u省蓹师蓹删aj ko~u mi删o~uo~u涩~僧aj, matiniaj a maf蓹n蓹kaj tam涩~僧aw, 删at蓹k iko~uran no~u 删a删o~uo~u涩~僧 师aaj paka删ijas to~u *** 涩~僧蓹mak ato~u kata删awan a sakapataj 删at蓹k. miti删i涩~僧aj 师i 删i xiao~uf蓹艐 mifa删i师aj 师i masao~u nikar
